title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 18 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 18/01/2022
Image reference: 2022-01-18_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-18-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have softened. VLCC Tsushima (310,400 DWT, Dec 2008, Mitsui Ichihara) sold to Greek buyers for USD 36.40 mil, VV value USD 37.33 mil - SS/DD Passed. Bulker: Supramax and Older Panamax values have softened.
